queries: Equipment status profile DDIC lookup pattern

summary: Equipment status profile lookup pattern: use the equipment object number to read status object context and active statuses. EQUI-OBJNR links to JSTO-OBJNR; JSTO-STSMA stores the assigned status profile key. EQUI-OBJNR also links through the same object number to JEST-OBJNR for active status records. Status profile descriptions are looked up by STSMA in status-profile text tables such as TJ20T with the required language. User status labels must be joined through STSMA plus ESTAT and language in TJ30/TJ30T; do not join TJ30T by ESTAT alone. System status labels use TJ02T for I* status codes. Screen fields such as JOSTD-SSTXT are display/dynpro structures, not the durable storage table for the status profile name. Confidence: medium internal_derived; verify exact DDIC availability and language/client handling in the target SAP system.
